2605.22060.title: Safeguarding Text-to-Image Generative Models Against Unauthorized Knowledge Distillation
2605.22060.paper_summary: Closed-weight generative services are increasingly deployed through query-based APIs, where users can obtain generated outputs while model parameters remain inaccessible. However, such deployment does not prevent model stealing: an attacker can repeatedly query the service, collect large volumes of released synthetic images, and use them as training data for a private substitute model. This query-output-driven process enables unauthorized knowledge distillation and capability replication without direct access to the original weights. To mitigate this threat, a practical defense should preserve the visual fidelity of released images, provide explicit control over perturbation magnitude, and scale efficiently to large-volume output release. We present WaveGuard, a single-pass, generator-based protection framework that safeguards released synthetic images under a user-specified perturbation budget. WaveGuard employs a frequency-aware perturbation generator to inject structured, imperceptible perturbations that maintain perceptual utility for benign viewers while reducing the usefulness of protected images as training data for unauthorized student models. Extensive experiments under WikiArt-related synthetic-output distillation settings show that WaveGuard achieves a favorable efficacy--fidelity--efficiency trade-off, with explicit imperceptibility control and substantial gains in protection efficiency.
2605.22060.paper_summary_zh: 封閉權重的生成服務越來越多地通過基於查詢的 API 部署，使用者可以獲得生成的輸出，而模型參數則無法訪問。<lb/>然而，這種部署並不能防止模型竊取：攻擊者可以反覆查詢服務，收集大量釋放的合成圖像，並將其用作私有替代模型的訓練數據。<lb/>這種基於查詢-輸出的過程使得未經授權的知識蒸餾和能力複製成為可能，而無需直接訪問原始權重。<lb/>為了減輕這一威脅，實用的防禦應該保持釋放圖像的視覺真實性，提供對擾動幅度的明確控制，並能有效擴展到大規模輸出釋放。<lb/>我們提出了 WaveGuard，一種單次通過的、基於生成器的保護框架，能在用戶指定的擾動預算下保護釋放的合成圖像。<lb/>WaveGuard 使用一種頻率感知的擾動生成器來注入結構化的、不可察覺的擾動，這些擾動保持了對良性觀眾的感知效用，同時降低了受保護圖像作為未經授權的學生模型訓練數據的有效性。<lb/>在與 WikiArt 相關的合成輸出蒸餾設置下的廣泛實驗顯示，WaveGuard 實現了良好的效能-真實性-效率權衡，具有明確的不可察覺性控制和顯著的保護效率提升。
2605.22060.author: Yilan Gao et.al.
2605.22060.authors: Yilan Gao, Sida Huang, Hongyuan Zhang, Xuelong Li
